title: High latency spike in user-service — p95 > 2.3s after v4.1.0 deploy
probable_root_cause: v4.1.0 introduced a synchronous call to a new geolocation microservice without a timeout. When geolocation service was slow (cold start), all user-service requests queued behind it. p95 latency rose from 120ms to 2300ms.
supporting_evidence: p95 latency crossed 500ms at 16:48 UTC — 6 minutes after v4.1.0 rollout at 16:42
Logs: 'waiting for geolocation response' appearing in every request trace
geolocation-service pod showed 0% CPU — cold start after scale-to-zero
Error rate remained low — requests completing but very slowly
resolved_by: ArgoCD rollback to v4.0.9. Latency recovered to baseline within 4 minutes. Follow-up: added 500ms timeout to geolocation call and pre-warm policy.
